mapper.select: SELECT LC.LEARN_ID AS ID, LC.TITLE AS TITLE, CASE LC.LEARN_TYPE WHEN '영상' THEN 'video' WHEN '지문읽기' THEN 'text' WHEN '링크' THEN 'link' WHEN '파일' THEN 'file' ELSE 'link' END AS TYPE, CASE WHEN NVL(LC.REQUIRED_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS REQUIRED, CASE WHEN LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN '완료' WHEN LP.STATUS IS NOT NULL THEN '진행중' ELSE '미시작' END AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DEADLINE, NVL(LC.TARGET_TIME, 0) AS DURATION, NVL(LP.PROGRESS_RATE, 0) AS PROGRESS, LC.CONTENT AS CONTENT, LC.DESCRIPTION AS DESCRIPTION, LC.GUIDE_POINT AS TEXT_CONTENT, LC.ATTACH_URL AS LINK_URL, TO_CHAR(LC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, NVL(LP.LAST_POSITION, '0') AS LAST_POSITION FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC JOIN LEARN_LIST LL ON LL.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_LIST_ID = LL.LEARN_LIST_ID LEFT JOIN LEARN_PRO LP ON LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} WHERE SC.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 3 WHEN LP.STATUS IS NOT NULL THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, LC.START_DATE DESC, LC.LEARN_ID DESC
